svg.title: gRPC Load-Balanced Architecture
svg.desc: Client sends gRPC request to Nginx load balancer, which distributes traffic to three Node.js gRPC servers. Each server calls Groq AI via REST API and returns the response.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the client send in a gRPC request?')
sendPrompt('How does Nginx distribute gRPC traffic?')
sendPrompt('What does a Node.js gRPC server do?')
sendPrompt('What does a Node.js gRPC server do?')
sendPrompt('What does a Node.js gRPC server do?')
sendPrompt('What is Groq AI and why is REST used here?')
